description: GS Plant Foods is an online store selling organic and natural fertilizers, soil products, and garden supplies. The site is a Shopify-powered storefront with agent-facing commerce instructions and UCP discovery metadata.
summary: gsplantfoods.com exposes public storefront browsing URLs, a public UCP discovery document at `/.well-known/ucp`, and an advertised UCP MCP endpoint for agent-driven commerce with undocumented authentication.

surfaces.name: GS Plant Foods storefront browsing endpoints
GS Plant Foods UCP MCP server
